summary: Resume Archive Game playback on the Games page
description:
GIVEN a user who is entitled for Archive game playback is logged in

AND the user is on the Home page

AND the user selects an Archive game for playback from the Today’s Lineup carousel

AND the user exits Archive game playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the same Archive game from the Games page

AND selects the same team feed for Resume playback
steps.result:
THEN the Games page is dismissed

AND the video player displays full screen

AND playback starts successfully from the Resumed point
